# defectdojo_notification_webhook (Data Source)

Data source for DefectDojo Notification Webhook

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_notification_webhook" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `header_name` (String) Name of the header required for interacting with the webhook endpoint.
- `header_value` (String, Sensitive) Content of the header required for interacting with the webhook endpoint.
- `name` (String) Name of the incoming webhook.
- `owner` (Number) Owner/receiver of notification.
- `status` (String) Status of the incoming webhook.
- `url` (String) The full URL of the incoming webhook.
